text_excerpt: Latest Updates - Luke Taylor MP Skip to main content Luke Taylor MP Get in Touch! Campaigns Sutton Liberal Democrats Latest Updates Newsletter Donate Join Donate Join News from across Sutton borough Sutton Backing local business: Seeing manufacturing up close in Beddington I recently visited Zotefoams’ manufacturing site in Beddington, and it was a fascinating chance to see a global business thriving right here in our area. 16 Apr 2026 View Sutton Keeping Sutton Safe: Meeting with local police I recently met with Superintendent Rich Lloyd-Ablitt at Sutton Police Station to raise the concerns residents have shared with me about crime and anti-social behaviour in our area. 10 Apr 2026 View Sutton Sutton Lib Dems unveil 2026 election manifesto with promise to “Keep Sutton Moving Forward” The party has revealed details of key new plans that will “deliver Sutton’s future”. 9 Apr 2026 View Bobby Dean With youth unemployment at a record high, we are failing the next generation In Parliament, I highlighted the escalating crisis of youth unemployment, now approaching one million. It is at its highest level in a decade, above the EU average, and has become a distinctly British problem that has worsened under this Government. 6 Mar 2026 View Bobby Dean To tackle fraud properly, Big Tech must play its part In Parliament this week, I brought back to the House an issue I have raised before: fraud. 12 Mar 2026 View Bobby Dean Stand up to vaccine misinformation campaigns to tackle childhood disease increase In Parliament, I raised the urgent need to tackle vaccine misinformation and rebuild trust in public health messaging. In moments of crisis, we are reminded just how much we rely on health professionals to keep us safe. 19 Mar 2026 View 1 2 3 4 5 … 60 The Liberal Democrats will use your contact details to send you information on the topics you have requested. Any data we gather will be used in accordance with our privacy policy at www.libdems.org.uk/privacy . To exercise your legal data rights, email: data.protection@libdems.org.uk . We take accessibility and your data privacy seriously. Read our accessibility statement and cookie policy . Promoted by the Liberal Democrats , First Floor, 66 Buckingham Gate, London SW1E 6AU. Website by Prater Raines . This website uses cookies Please select the types of cookies you want to allow. Essential These are necessary for the website to function properly. Analytics These help us to understand how our visitors use our website. Marketing These allow us to display content from other websites that track you for advertising purposes.
